William W. Bunting III, Bunting, Drayton & Alward LLP (415)617-0244, for defendant and moving party: Richard Smith
John Eng, Anthony Head Law Offices (415)421-4825 for Plaintiff and opposing party: Creditors Trade Association
RULING:
A R G U E D. DEFENDANT RICHARD SMITH'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT: GRANTED, RESPONSIVE PLEADING SHOULD BE FILED AND SERVED BY 12/21/04. ORDER SIGNED. (301/JLW/ca-x) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-17-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-27-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on for Default Prove Up
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Marta Vallejo, CSR: Yvonne Lee
Appearances:
Douglass B. Provencher, Esq. For Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., Sandra Hidalgo, Accounts Manger for the Cronicle, also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff: Creditors Trade Association, Inc. and against the defendant: Smith Bros. Motors, Inc.
As follows:
Principal $35,240.00
Costs of $358.00
Interest of $7,714.00
For the total of $43,313.00
Attorney fees per memo of costs
Judgment signed in open court.
